title: Cobbled Bedrock
description: Makes bedrock more cobbled and dark
body:
**Replace your boring bedrock with something more unique!**

This resource-pack makes the bedrock more _cobbled_ and _dark_.

![Cobbled bedrock in a mine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc758bf240adc5e4b1d148ee2b3a23b4bcbde7cb_0.webp)

![Cobbled bedrock with other cobbled blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34eefff34072d2beb84b7e13c35e393850faf2dc.png)
